text: A street scene in a densely populated area, likely India. On the left is a two-story building with a corrugated metal awning and a blue storefront entrance. A man wearing a blue and white patterned shirt stands near the entrance. To the right, a smaller, single-story wooden structure is heavily damaged, with its roof partially collapsed and exposed wooden beams and debris. A motorcycle is parked near the damaged building. The background shows a clear blue sky and a large white wall or structure.
